ddls:
CREATE TABLE "media_content" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media entry */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the media content */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the media content was released */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the media content */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the media content in minutes */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Total number of views for the media content */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., movie, documentary, short film) */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the media was produced */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the media */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company responsible for the media */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the media content */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the media content */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the media's trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the media's poster */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the media entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Drama, Action) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Birth year of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the director */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards won by the director */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the director's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Birth year of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the actor */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards won by the actor */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the actor's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_genres" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media entry */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre associated with the media entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_directors" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media entry */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director associated with the media entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id", "director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_actors" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media entry */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor associated with the media entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id", "actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, viewer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media entry being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "spoiler" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the review contains spoilers */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., initial, update, follow-up) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_content ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewing_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewing record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the media */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media entry that was viewed */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the media was viewed */,
  "view_duration" REAL /* Duration of the viewing session in minutes */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for viewing (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the media was viewed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the viewing record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewing_history_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_content ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewing_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)
